structured_payload_candidate.title: VAV Reheat Zone Endpoints by Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active airflow setpoint endpoints vary by Zone Group mode as defined in Table 5.6.4.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Group mode (Occupied, Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied)
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling maximum endpoint is Vcool-max in Occupied/Cooldown/Setup, 0 otherwise. Cooling minimum endpoint is Vmin* in Occupied, 0 otherwise. Minimum endpoint is Vmin* in Occupied, 0 otherwise. Heating minimum endpoint is Max(Vheat-min, min*) in Occupied, Vheat-min in Cooldown, 0 in Setup, Vheat-max in Warmup/Setback, 0 in Unoccupied. Heating maximum endpoint is Max(Vheat-max, min*) in Occupied, Vheat-max in Cooldown, 0 in Setup, Vcool-max in Warmup/Setback, 0 in Unoccupied.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Table 5.6.4 Endpoints  as a Function of Zone Group  Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Cooling minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating minimum  Max
(Vheat -min, min*)  Vheat -min 0 Vheat -max Vheat -max 0
Heating maximum  Max
(Vheat -max, min*)  Vheat -max 0 Vcool -max Vcool -max 0

evidence_quote:
Table 5.6.4 Endpoints  as a Function of Zone Group  Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Cooling minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating minimum  Max
(Vheat -min, min*)  Vheat -min 0 Vheat -max Vheat -max 0
Heating maximum  Max
(Vheat -max, min*)  Vheat -max 0 Vcool -max Vcool -max 0

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling State Airflow Setpoint Mapping
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output is mapped to the active airflow setpoint from cooling minimum to cooling maximum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless DAT is below minimum setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is cooling
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Active airflow setpoint = cooling-loop output mapped between cooling minimum endpoint and cooling maximum endpoint. Heating coil disabled unless DAT < minimum setpoint (see 5.6.5.4). If supply air temperature > room temperature, active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
When the Zone State  is cooling , the cooling -loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint  from the cooling minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum  endpoint . Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT  is below the minimum setpoint  (see Section 5.6.5.4 ).
a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint  shall be no higher than the minimum  endpoint .

evidence_quote:
When the Zone State  is cooling , the cooling -loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint  from the cooling minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum  endpoint . Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT  is below the minimum setpoint  (see Section 5.6.5.4 ).
a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint  shall be no higher than the minimum  endpoint .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband State Airflow Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is deadband, active airflow setpoint is the minimum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless DAT is below minimum setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is deadband
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Active airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint. Heating coil disabled unless DAT < minimum setpoint (see 5.6.5.4).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State  is deadband , the active airflow setpoint  shall be the minimum endpoint . Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT  is below the minimum setpoint  (see Section 5.6.5.4 ).

evidence_quote: When the Zone State  is deadband , the active airflow setpoint  shall be the minimum endpoint . Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT  is below the minimum setpoint  (see Section 5.6.5.4 ).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating State Sequence – Discharge Temperature Reset (0-50%)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 0% to 50% heating-loop output, reset discharge temperature setpoint from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Active airflow setpoint is the heating minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating and heating-loop output between 0% and 50%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Discharge temperature setpoint resets from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Active airflow setpoint = heating minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. From 0 % to 50%, the heating -loop output shall reset the discharge temperature setpoint  from the current AHU SAT setpoint  to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint . The active airflow setpoint  shall be the heating minimum  endpoint .

evidence_quote: a. From 0 % to 50%, the heating -loop output shall reset the discharge temperature setpoint  from the current AHU SAT setpoint  to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint . The active airflow setpoint  shall be the heating minimum  endpoint .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating State Sequence – Airflow Reset (51-100%)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 51% to 100% heating-loop output, if DAT > room temperature + 3°C (5°F), reset active airflow setpoint from heating minimum endpoint to heating maximum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating, heating-loop output between 51% and 100%, and DAT > room temperature + 3°C (5°F)
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Active airflow setpoint resets from heating minimum endpoint to heating maximum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. From 51 % to 100%, if the DAT  is greater than room temperature plus 3°C (5°F), the heating -loop output shall reset the active airflow setpoint  from the heating minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint .

evidence_quote: b. From 51 % to 100%, if the DAT  is greater than room temperature plus 3°C (5°F), the heating -loop output shall reset the active airflow setpoint  from the heating minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Coil Modulation and PWM Interlock
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Heating coil shall be modulated to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint. Direct control from zone temperature loop is not acceptable. When airflow setpoint is pulse-width modulated, heating coil and PID loop shall be disabled with output set to 0 during closed periods.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating coil enabled
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate heating coil to maintain DAT at setpoint. If airflow setpoint is PWM, disable heating coil and PID loop, set output to 0 during closed periods.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
c. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature a t setpoint . (Directly controlling heating off the zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).
1. When the airflow setpoint  is pulse -width modulated per Section 5.2.2 , the heating coil and PID loop shall be disabled , with output set to 0 during closed periods.

evidence_quote:
c. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature a t setpoint . (Directly controlling heating off the zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).
1. When the airflow setpoint  is pulse -width modulated per Section 5.2.2 , the heating coil and PID loop shall be disabled , with output set to 0 during closed periods.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Occupied Mode Minimum DAT Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In Occupied Mode, the heating coil shall be modulated to maintain a DAT no lower than 10°C (50°F).
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Occupied Mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate heating coil to maintain DAT ≥ 10°C (50°F).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: In Occupied Mode , the heating coil shall be modulated to maintain a DAT  no lower than 10°C (50°F).

evidence_quote: In Occupied Mode , the heating coil shall be modulated to maintain a DAT  no lower than 10°C (50°F).

structured_payload_candidate.title: VAV Damper Modulation to Airflow Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Always
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate VAV damper to maintain measured airflow = active airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.

evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm – Level 4
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate a Level 4 alarm if measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the measu red airflow is less than 70% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: a. If the measu red airflow is less than 70% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm – Level 3
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate a Level 3 alarm if measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Importance-Multiplier 0
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R loop
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suppress low airflow alarms for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its static pressure reset T&R  control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its static pressure reset T&R  control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low-Discharge Air Temperature Alarm – Level 4
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON and DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating hot-water plant proven ON AND DAT < setpoint - 8.3°C (15°F) for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: DAT < setpoint - 8.3°C (15°F) for 10 minutes while heating hot-water plant is ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: a. If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low-Discharge Air Temperature Alarm – Level 3
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON and DAT is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating hot-water plant proven ON AND DAT < setpoint - 17°C (30°F) for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: DAT < setpoint - 17°C (30°F) for 10 minutes while heating hot-water plant is ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. If heating hot -water plant is prove n ON, and the DAT  is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: b. If heating hot -water plant is prove n ON, and the DAT  is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low-DAT Alarm Suppression for Importance-Multiplier 0
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its hot-water reset T&R control loop, low-DAT alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for hot-water reset T&R loop
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suppress low-DAT alarms for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its hot-water  reset T&R  control loop, low -DAT  alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its hot-water  reset T&R  control loop, low -DAT  alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan OFF AND airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes while fan is OFF
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 30 minutes , generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 30 minutes , generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If damper position is 0% and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position = 0% AND airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes AND fan proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper position = 0% and airflow > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan is ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0 %, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50  cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0 %, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50  cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Valve Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If valve position is 0% for 15 minutes, DAT is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), and the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Valve position = 0% for 15 minutes AND DAT > AHU SAT + 3°C (5°F) AND fan proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Valve position = 0% for 15 minutes, DAT > AHU SAT + 3°C (5°F), fan ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the valve position is 0% for 15 minutes, DAT  is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), and the fan serving the zone is proven ON, genera te a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the valve position is 0% for 15 minutes, DAT  is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), and the fan serving the zone is proven ON, genera te a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches interlocked to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force damper full closed/open; force heating to OFF/closed; and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Commissioning mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Software switches shall allow forcing of airflow setpoints, damper position, heating state, and reset of request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify that software switches can force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force damper full closed/open; force heating to OFF/closed; and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force  zone airflow setpoint  to zero ,
b. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vcool -max,
c. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vmin ,
d. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vheat -max,
e. force  damper full closed/open ,
f. force  heating to OFF/closed , and
g. reset  request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section ).

evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force  zone airflow setpoint  to zero ,
b. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vcool -max,
c. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vmin ,
d. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vheat -max,
e. force  damper full closed/open ,
f. force  heating to OFF/closed , and
g. reset  request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section ).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Zone sends cooling SAT reset requests based on zone temperature exceeding cooling setpoint or cooling loop output.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Various conditions
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: If zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes after suppression period, send 3 requests. Else if exceeds by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes after suppression, send 2 requests. Else if Cooling Loop > 95%, send 1 request until Cooling Loop < 85%. Else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change pe r Section 5.1.20 , send 3 requests.
b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 2 requests.
c. Else if the Cooling Loop  is greater than 95%, send 1 request  until the Cooling Loop  is less than 85%.
d. Else if the Cooling Loop  is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote:
a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change pe r Section 5.1.20 , send 3 requests.
b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 2 requests.
c. Else if the Cooling Loop  is greater than 95%, send 1 request  until the Cooling Loop  is less than 85%.
d. Else if the Cooling Loop  is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Static Pressure Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Zone sends static pressure reset requests based on measured airflow vs setpoint and damper position.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Various conditions
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: If measured airflow < 50% of setpoint while setpoint > 0 and damper position > 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests. Else if measured airflow < 70% of setpoint while setpoint > 0 and damper position > 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests. Else if damper position > 95%, send 1 request until damper position < 85%. Else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  while setpoint  is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint  is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request  until the damper position is less than 85 %.
d. Else if the damper position is l ess than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote:
a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  while setpoint  is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint  is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request  until the damper position is less than 85 %.
d. Else if the damper position is l ess than 95%, send 0 requests.
